text:
ByOscar Hartzog

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

Artistic Gymnastics is flipping onwards at the2024 Paris Olympics. First added as a permanent fixture in 1896, gymnastics is now one of the most anticipated competitions in the summer games.

One of the reasons for fans’ excitement around gymnastics is due to one competitor:Simone Biles. 27-year-old American superstar has already set multiple records while picking up two gold medals for a career total of nine — the most of any US gymnast in history.

The Olympics gymnastics competition makes it landing on Aug. 5, but there are a few medal events left to go this weekend. Read on for a full guide on how tolivestreamOlympics gymnastics without cable in 2024, plus a way to watch gymnastics online for free.

If you’re wondering when Simone Biles is competing, scroll down to the bottom of this page for a list of Biles’ remaining events.

Olympic gymnastics events are being broadcast on NBC, USA Network, and E!, but cord-cutters can watch gymnastics online without cable usingPeacockor any live TV streaming service that carries the above channels (DirecTV Stream,Hulu + Live TV,fubo, andSlingwill all work). Below is a further breakdown of each service, including free trial and pricing information.

Peacockis this year’s gold medal winner in terms of Olympics coverage, offering streams of every event and a whip around show if you want to watch multiple events. The service is very affordable at $7.99 a month, although it does not offer a free trial.



Peacock offers both live and on-demand content, including sports like WWE, Golf, and Olympics, and series likeThe OfficeandYellowstone. Subscriptions start at $7.99 a month.

DirecTV Streamcarries NBC, USA Network, and E! in all of its packages, making it a great way to watch Olympics gymnastics online. It starts with afive-day free trialand costs $79.99 a month after that.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

Another great cable streamer that you can use to watch Olympics gymnastics online isHulu + Live TV, which carries NBC, USA Network, and E!. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month, but you get athree-day free trialto start.



Hulu + Live TV bundles together Hulu’s on-demand library and over 95 live TV channels, including local channels and almost all popular national channels. Subscriptions also include ESPN+ and Disney+ at no additional cost. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month after a three-day free trial.

fubooffers the longestfree trialon this list (seven days) and carries NBC, USA Network, and E! for Olympic gymnastics livestreams. If you keep fubo past the free trial, packages start at $79.99 a month.



fubo’s massive streaming plans carry up to 275+ channels, and you can get even more depending on your location. Packages start at $79.99 a month, and you get seven days to try the service for free.

Slingis a more affordable live TV Olympics streaming option. Its 46-channel Blue package — which includes NBC, USA Network, and E! — costs $45. There’s no free trial, however.



Sling is one of the most affordable live TV streaming services, with packages starting at $40 a month. You can get up to 46 channels in the Sling Orange + Blue plan, plus more withSling’s add-ons.

If you’re looking for free Olympics gymnastics livestreams, be sure to use the free trials fromDirecTV Stream,fubo, andHulu + Live TV. If you string them together, you’ll get 15 days of free streaming, which is more than enough to watch every Olympics gymnastics event for free.

The 2024 Paris Olympics gymnastics competitions run from July 27 to Aug. 5. Here’s a schedule of key medal events:

Saturday, Aug. 3Men’s floor exercise final — 9:30 a.m. ET/6:30 a.m. PTWomen’s vault final — 10:20 a.m. ET/7:20 a.m. PTMen’s pommel horse final — 11:16 a.m. ET/8:16 a.m. PT

Sunday, Aug. 4Men’s rings final — 9 a.m. ET/6 a.m. PTWomen’s uneven bar final — 9:40 a.m. ET/6:40 a.m. PTMen’s vault final — 10:24 a.m. ET/7:24 a.m. PT

Monday, Aug. 5Men’s parallel bars final — 5:45 a.m. ET/2:45 a.m. PTWomen’s balance beam finals — 6:36 a.m. ET/3:36 a.m. PTWomen’s floor exercise finals — 8:20 a.m. ET/5:20 a.m. PTMen’s horizontal bar final — 7:33 a.m. ET/4 a.m. PT

Wondering which events Simone Biles is competing in? The GOAT qualified for every individual final, except the uneven bars. Here are the three events remaining where you can watch Biles at work:

Saturday, Aug. 3 – Women’s vault final (10:20 a.m. ET)Monday, Aug. 5 – Women’s balance beam final (6:36 a.m. ET)Monday, Aug. 5 – Women’s floor exercise final (8:20 a.m. ET)

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How to Watch Olympics Gymnastics Games Online for Free Without Cable
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch Olympics gymnastics online during the 2024 Paris Olympics, plus where to find free Olympics gymnastics livestreams without cable.
